creator: hoek@hwcn.org
text:
On Fri, 7 Nov 1997 dburr@POBoxes.com wrote:

> # ------ ---------- ------------------------------------------
> #     58 -rw-r--r-- xmame/files/md5
> #    460 -rwxr-xr-x xmame/files/dos2unx
> #  58012 -rw-r--r-- xmame/patches/patch-aa

Whoever commits this should also try to pull in PREFIX.  It's
compiled-in, so passing cc a strategic define should do the
trick.  Multi-file patches should be broken up.  These are fairly
small changes, so it's probably not necessary to resubmit the
port (same goes for yodl) --- whoever reviews it can just change
a couple of lines (unless I missed something and it's more
complicated than it looks).

I like the addition of a manpage.  :)


--
Outnumbered?  Maybe.  Outspoken?  Never!
tIM...HOEk
